response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:22: Identified performance of 'only my railgun' by AZKi, Suisei, Towa, IRyS. Original artist: fripSide. Found lyrics. 2. 03:22-03:45: Identified interlude/transition. 3. 03:45-05:05: Identified performance of '青のすみか' by AZKi, Suisei, Towa, IRyS. Original artist: Tatsuya Kitani. Found lyrics and verified.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by several VTubers (AZKi, Tokoyami Towa, Hoshimachi Suisei, and IRyS). They perform two songs: 'only my railgun' by fripSide and '青のすみか' (Ao no Sumika) by Tatsuya Kitani. The performance includes choreography and stage production.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform 'only my railgun'. The stage features energetic lighting and choreography. Text identifying the song title 'only my railgun' appears.
scenes.performer_in_video: AZKi, Hoshimachi Suisei, Tokoyami Towa, IRyS
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
放て！心に刻んだ夢を
未来さえ置き去りにして
限界など知らない
意味無い！
この能力が光散らす
その先に遥かな想いを

Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way
Only my railgun can shoot it 今すぐ
身体中を光の速さで
駆け巡った確かな予感

掴め！望むものなら残さず
輝ける自分らしさで
信じてるよ
あの日の誓いを
この瞳に光る涙
それさえも強さになるから

立ち止まると少しだけ
感じる切なさに
戸惑う事
無いなんて嘘はつかないよ

宇宙に舞うコインが描く
放物線が決める運命
打ち出した答えが今日も
私の胸を駆け巡る

Sparkling! The shiny lights awake true desire
Only my railgun can shoot it 必ず
貫いてく戸惑うことなく
傷ついても走り続ける

狙え！凛と煌く視線は
狂い無く闇を切り裂く
迷いなんて
吹き飛ばせばいい
この心が叫ぶ限り
誰ひとり邪魔などさせない

儚く舞う無数の願いは
この両手に積もってゆく
切り裂く闇に見えてくるのは
重く深く切ない記憶

色褪せてく現実に揺れる
絶望には負けたくない
私が今私であること
胸を張って全て誇れる！

Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way
Only my railgun can shoot it 今すぐ
身体中を光の速さで
駆け巡った確かな予感

放て！心に刻んだ夢を
未来さえ置き去りにして
限界など知らない
意味無い！
この能力が光散らす
その先に遥かな想いを
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let go! Of the dreams engraved in your heart
Leaving even the future behind
I don't know any limits
It's meaningless!
This power scatters light
And far beyond that, my feelings

Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way
Only my railgun can shoot it, right now
With the speed of light throughout my body
An unshakeable premonition that ran through me

Grab it! Don't leave behind anything you wish for
With a brilliance that is uniquely yours
I believe in you
In the promise of that day
The tears that shine in these eyes
Will even become strength

When I stand still, just a little
The heartbreak I feel
Don't say there's no confusion
I won't lie to you

The parabola drawn by the coin dancing in space
Determines my fate
The answer I shot out today also
Runs through my heart

Sparkling! The shiny lights awake true desire
Only my railgun can shoot it, definitely
I'll keep piercing through without hesitation
Even if I get hurt, I'll keep running

Aim! The gaze that sparkles coldly
Without fail, it cuts through the darkness
It's fine if you just blow away
Your hesitation
As long as this heart screams
I won't let anyone get in my way

Fleetingly dancing, countless wishes
Are piling up in these hands
What comes into view in the darkness I cut through
Is a heavy, deep, and painful memory

Fading, swaying in reality
I don't want to lose to despair
That I am who I am now
I can hold my head high and be proud of it all!

Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way
Only my railgun can shoot it, right now
With the speed of light throughout my body
An unshakeable premonition that ran through me

Let go! Of the dreams engraved in your heart
Leaving even the future behind
I don't know any limits
It's meaningless!
This power scatters light
And far beyond that, my feelings

scenes.description: Transition interlude on stage. No singing.
The VTubers perform '青のすみか'. The stage features blue lighting. Text identifying the song title '青のすみか' appears.
scenes.performer_in_video: AZKi, Hoshimachi Suisei, Tokoyami Towa, IRyS
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どこまでも続くような青の季節は
四つ並ぶ眼の前を遮るものは何もない
アスファルト、蝉時雨を反射して
きみという沈黙が聞こえなくなる
この日々が色褪せる
僕と違うきみの匂いを知ってしまっても
置き忘れてきた永遠の底に
今でも青が棲んでいる
今でも青は澄んでいる
どんな祈りも言葉も
近づけるのに、届かなかった
まるで、静かな恋のような
頬を伝った夏のような色のなか
きみを呼ぶ言葉が、
ずっと喉の奥につかえてる
「また会えるよね」って、声にならない声
喉に並ぶな、ごめん
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The season of blue that seems to last forever
There is nothing blocking the front of the four pairs of eyes
Asphalt reflecting the cicada's chirping
The silence called 'you' becomes inaudible
This day fades away
Even if I know of your scent that is different from mine
In the depths of the eternity we left behind
Even now, the blue dwells
Even now, the blue is clear
Any prayer or words
Though I can get closer, they didn't reach
Like a quiet love
Inside the color that resembles the summer that traced my cheeks
The words calling you
Are still stuck in the back of my throat
'I can see you again, right?' I say, in a voice that cannot be heard
There's nothing left, I'm sorry.
